codeReview.summary: The implementation in commit 67fd18d99801eb8491ba7b983dac4add7c331cc9 satisfies the feature scope: token header is migrated to Tamagui with a 56px circular logo, heading3-style name sizing (25px/30px), body2-style symbol sizing (17px) in neutral2, and a condensed sticky header that appears on scroll with reduced logo size and price display. The page integration passes price into TokenHeader without breaking existing data flow. No blocking or non-blocking correctness regressions were identified in the reviewed diff.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The skill requires TDD for Tamagui feature work, but the web workspace still lacks a real frontend test harness, so workers repeatedly have to deviate from the procedure.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/skills/tamagui-frontend-worker/SKILL.md ("2. Write Tests First (TDD)") vs web/package.json ("test": "echo 'test: ok'") and handoff skillFeedback in /Users/maxmohammadi/.factory/missions/79476079-9b4c-40cb-b69e-9e85801c6056/handoffs/2026-04-02T01-00-25-356Z__token-header-tamagui__2521427d-4f60-4ace-812b-3a9d20a57acf.json.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The skill mandates agent-browser verification but does not document canonical CLI invocation patterns, which led to initial command trial-and-error.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Transcript skeleton entry for worker session 2521427d-4f60-4ace-812b-3a9d20a57acf in /Users/maxmohammadi/.factory/missions/79476079-9b4c-40cb-b69e-9e85801c6056/worker-transcripts.jsonl shows a failed `agent-browser --session ... --url ...` attempt ("Unknown command: --url") before help lookup and corrected usage.

summary: Reviewed feature token-header-tamagui for milestone component-migration using the worker transcript skeleton and commit diff. The migration is correct for the requested behavior and no code defects were found; two recurring skill-documentation gaps were noted.
